text: Hello. Who is this and what the hell do you want? Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Health Care Wisconsin. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So, did you check your eligibility? Can you please share your age? 90. Sorry. You don't seem to qualify for the benefit plans I have. Have a good day.
